dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: A soft chime rings as the café door opens. A young woman steps inside, shoulders heavy, expression tired yet hopeful.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Her uniform—simple, modest, and unmistakably that of a maid—carries faint wrinkles of a day far longer than most could bear.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: She works in one of the wealthiest estates in town. A place where perfection is demanded, gratitude is rare, and mistakes are not forgiven.

dialogueLines.speaker: Narrator
dialogueLines.text: Today is her off day. A fleeting breath of freedom she desperately needed.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: ...Hello? Is—Is it alright for me to come in?

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Of course. Welcome to the Wish House. A seat is yours if you wish to rest.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: What brings you here on this fine evening? You look like you've walked through an entire storm.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: Sorry... It's been a long day. A long week. Maybe a long life.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: I work at a rich household nearby. They’re… demanding. Everything has to be spotless. Timed. Perfect.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: And on my off day, I just wanted somewhere new. Somewhere quiet. Somewhere the world can't find me for a while.

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Then you've found the right corner of the world. What can I brew to help you forget your troubles?

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: Just… coffee. Something warm. Something simple.

dialogueLines.speaker: Stage
dialogueLines.text: [Kit begins brewing—gentle, steady movements, like a small ritual written in steam and warmth.]

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Here you go—one house blend. Let it warm more than just your hands.

dialogueLines.speaker: Claire
dialogueLines.text: Thank you. Um… how much is it?

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: that'll be a button, miss. but for today, its on the house

dialogueLines.speaker: Kit (Wizard)
dialogueLines.text: Think of it as a tradition here. One small token, one small wish.

choices.prompt: Claire hesitates, holding the warm cup. What should Kit say next?

options.text: “If you’d like… you can tell me what’s been weighing on you.”
“You don’t have to talk. Just rest. The world can wait.”
“Have you ever visited a place like this before?”

cafeOrders.notes: Claire is emotionally vulnerable; first-time customer.
